title: Global Us
subTitle: Scientists warn that a key Atlantic current system that brings warm water to Europe is weakening. Also: rising puma numbers cause conflict in Patagonia, and Bulgaria's legendary teacher fosters world class physicists.

title: Eco Africa
subTitle: Centuries-old beliefs protect Ghana's monkeys, but rising tensions and habitat loss now put that bond to the test. Plus: a literal lifeline for South Africa's seabirds and a hand-built amateur EV truck.

title: Reporter -- On Location
subTitle: Artificial insemination has been a possibility for decades, yet aspects of it are still being debated - including in Europe. Not least of those is whether there should be a limit on how many times a donor can give sperm.
